description: During a stockroom audit, several spare parts were identified as defective, expired, or recalled. Log in as admin/admin. Process and validate scrap orders in Odoo Inventory for these five products with the exact quantities specified: 15 units of Timken 6205-2RS (SCRAP-001), 8 units of Gates PowerGrip GT3 (SCRAP-002), 3 units of Parker 421SN-8 (SCRAP-003), 25 units of Bando 5VX800 (SCRAP-005), and 6 units of Festo DNC-40-100-PPV-A (SCRAP-006). Do not scrap any units of SKF 22215 E (SCRAP-004) as it passed re-inspection.

natural_language.prompt: During a stockroom audit, several spare parts were identified as defective, expired, or recalled. Log in as admin/admin. You must process scrap orders in Odoo Inventory for these five products with the exact quantities specified: 15 units of Timken 6205-2RS (SCRAP-001), 8 units of Gates PowerGrip GT3 (SCRAP-002), 3 units of Parker 421SN-8 (SCRAP-003), 25 units of Bando 5VX800 (SCRAP-005), and 6 units of Festo DNC-40-100-PPV-A (SCRAP-006). Navigate to Inventory -> Operations -> Scrap to create and validate these scrap orders. Do NOT scrap any units of SKF 22215 E (SCRAP-004) as it passed re-inspection.
